title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF KABULUSAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PAKIL, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA, TO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO KABULUSAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1680 / 50 OG No. 6, 2387 (June, 1954)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1027, June 12, 1954 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF KABULUSAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PAKIL, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA, TO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS BARRIO KABULUSAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Kabulusan in the municipality of Pakil, Province of Laguna, is hereby converted to a barrio to be known as barrio Kabulusan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 12, 1954.
